历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6632 → 7911 → 6806 → 8388 → 8898, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2266 places in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 8898; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 22 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 21 in 2025, generally stable in the 20–23 range; the 2026 plan is 22, an increase of 1 (about 4.8%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 82–92 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the reputation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication A++); the reputation in the 2026 cycle turned slightly negative (dormitory fire incident), but overall attention remains high; ranked 11th in Douyin comprehensive popularity (high heat), with large short video exposure; no obvious admission gaps recorded; Journalism and Communication A+, related to majors such as Communication Studies, Network and New Media, and Advertising (Computational Advertising) under Physics Category; Computer Science and Technology, Digital Media Technology, and other majors, though not individually rated as A-class disciplines, are key development areas for the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors are consistently highly recommended in society, with Digital Media Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and other directions receiving high attention; the total number of college entrance exam takers in Chongqing in 2026 is about 209,000, with Physics Category accounting for approximately 66% based on recent averages, about 138,000, roughly the same as 2025 (about 139,000); 2026; the university is located in Beijing, not a local province university; regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in Physics Category rankings, the slight mitigating effect of a 4.8% enrollment expansion in 2026, the increased attention from Douyin's high popularity, and the sustained high social demand for Computer/Electronic Information majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward (larger ranking number = slightly intensified competition) from the baseline of 8898, but the extent of the backward shift will narrow due to the offsetting effects of expansion and popularity, with a predicted ranking of about 9102, in the range of 8602–9602.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 959 → 858 → 1537 → 2861 → 2031, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend. After a significant drop to 2861 in 2024, it rebounded to 2031 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 830 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2031. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's History Category was 10 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, showing a slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 14, an increase of 2 (about 16.7%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 82–92 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was relatively positive, mainly due to Journalism and Communication being rated A++ level. In the 2026 cycle, the reputation turned slightly negative (involving a dormitory fire incident), but overall attention remains high. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 11th (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. Journalism and Communication is A+ (top in the country), the only A-class discipline of this university, highly related to History Category majors such as Journalism, Communication, Advertising, and International Journalism and Communication, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Journalism and Communication major category in 2023 was clearly discouraged (Zhang Xuefeng effect), but it was not separately listed in 2024, and overall public opinion has stabilized. Computer/Electronic Information categories continue to be highly recommended. The total number of Chongqing college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 209,000, slightly down from about 213,000 in 2025. The History Category proportion, estimated at about 33% based on recent averages, is about 69,000 people, with a slightly reduced competition base. The university is located in Beijing, not a local province university. The university_enrollment_summary does not contain data for Communication University of China, so the local enrollment proportion cannot be calculated, and regional preference factors apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the easing effect of a 16.7% expansion in 2026, the increased attention from Douyin's high heat, and the brand effect of the A+ discipline in Journalism and Communication, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly rise (smaller ranking number = slightly intensified competition) from the baseline of 2031. The predicted ranking is approximately 2204, with a range of 1807–2601.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1807), focus on sprinting for A+ flagship majors like Journalism and International Journalism and Communication.
